problem id: fc174f21
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND SHL(7)

examples:
  11110001 -> 10000000
  10000011 -> 00000000
  11100001 -> 10000000
  10011000 -> 00000000
  00010111 -> 00000000
  01100110 -> 00000000
  01100000 -> 00000000
  10110110 -> 00000000
  10111001 -> 00000000

query: 01000000
predicted answer: 00000000
